title: Polish Millet Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful side dish originating from Poland, perfect for accompanying various main courses.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced polish sausage and cook until browned, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the millet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the flour and stir to combine.
Gradually add the broth, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the millet is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
